allow:
Bash(/usr/bin/python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/Users/stucker/claude/subnetCalculator'\)
from subnet_calculator import api_subnet, api_split, api_vlsm, api_supernet, api_range, api_ipv6, api_wildcard

# Test IPv4 subnet
r = api_subnet\('192.168.1.100/24'\)
print\('=== IPv4 /24 ==='\)
print\(f'Network: {r[\\"network\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Broadcast: {r[\\"broadcast\\"]}'\)
print\(f'First: {r[\\"first_host\\"]} / Last: {r[\\"last_host\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Hosts: {r[\\"num_hosts\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Wildcard: {r[\\"wildcard_mask\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Class: {r[\\"ip_class\\"]}  Type: {r[\\"ip_type\\"]}'\)
print\(\)

# Test /31
r31 = api_subnet\('10.0.0.1/31'\)
print\('=== /31 point-to-point ==='\)
print\(f'Hosts: {r31[\\"num_hosts\\"]}  Broadcast: {r31[\\"broadcast\\"]}'\)
print\(\)

# Test split
s = api_split\('192.168.0.0/24', 'count', '4'\)
print\(f'=== Split into 4 ==='\)
print\(f'Total: {s[\\"total\\"]}  Prefix: /{s[\\"prefix\\"]}'\)
for sub in s[\\"subnets\\"]:
    print\(f'  {sub[\\"cidr\\"]}  hosts={sub[\\"hosts\\"]}'\)
print\(\)

# Test VLSM
v = api_vlsm\('192.168.10.0/24', [
    {'name': 'Engineering', 'hosts': 50},
    {'name': 'Management',  'hosts': 10},
    {'name': 'Server Farm', 'hosts': 100},
]\)
print\('=== VLSM ==='\)
for a in v['allocations']:
    print\(f'  {a[\\"name\\"]}: {a[\\"cidr\\"]}  usable={a[\\"usable\\"]}'\)
print\(f'  Remaining: {v[\\"remaining\\"]}'\)
print\(\)

# Test supernet
sn = api_supernet\(['192.168.0.0/24','192.168.1.0/24','192.168.2.0/24','192.168.3.0/24']\)
print\(f'=== Supernet ===  {sn[\\"collapsed\\"]}'\)

# Test range
rng = api_range\('192.168.1.0', '192.168.1.255'\)
print\(f'=== Range → CIDR ===  {rng[\\"cidrs\\"]}'\)

# Test IPv6
i6 = api_ipv6\('2001:db8::1/32'\)
print\(f'=== IPv6 ==='\)
print\(f'  Compressed: {i6[\\"compressed\\"]}'\)
print\(f'  Expanded: {i6[\\"expanded\\"]}'\)
print\(f'  Network: {i6[\\"network\\"]}  Type: {i6[\\"type\\"]}'\)

# Test wildcard
wc = api_wildcard\('192.168.1.0/24'\)
print\(\)
print\(f'=== Wildcard ==='\)
print\(f'  Wildcard: {wc[\\"wildcard\\"]}'\)
print\(f'  OSPF: {wc[\\"ospf\\"]}'\)
print\(f'  Cisco ext: {wc[\\"cisco_ext\\"]}'\)
")
